subject: Life Skills
title: Career Explorer
tagline: Discover different careers and the skills they require!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What does a doctor do?
options: Helps students learn new skills and knowledge
Treats sick people and helps them get better
Researches and reports the news
Studies and investigates how the world works
stages.correctOption: Treats sick people and helps them get better
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Treats sick people and helps them get better is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Treats sick people and helps them get better.
